We are a family-owned company established in 2016. Owner/operator Syreeta Chenneh-Dweh was inspired to open our first home by the compassionate, resourceful nurse who cared for her dying mother. Through sacrifice and excellence, our first two residents experienced improvement in their quality of life. As the word spread, the founders soon had a full house and eventually a waiting list."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Starting from that first home at 512 N. Bebe, we now have a portfolio of 4 home plus locations. We plan to open more homes to serve Wichita’s growing senior population."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Wichita families have trusted us to care for their loved ones for almost a decade because of our unwavering commitment to quality care and our wealth of experience."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["If you are looking for assisted living within the comfort of a home, we are here to help you."," "]}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"relative","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"aspect-[6/5] relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-secondary/10 ","children":["$","$L6",null,{"src":"/family-photo.jpg","alt":"Fusion Senior Care Homes family owners with their pets","fill":true,"className":"object-cover object-top sm:object-contain sm:object-center"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"absolute -bottom-6 -right-6 w-24 h-24 bg-accent/20 rounded-full -z-10"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"absolute -top-6 -left-6 w-16 h-16 bg-primary/20 rounded-full -z-10"}]]}]]}]}]}]
